zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Brereton於大約1415年出生在英國爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可時，他的父親William Brereton27歲，母親Alice Corbet27歲。他於1452年4月28日與Lydia Ward在英國巴金哈姆爾萊可哈普斯亞德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1505年5月2日在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾布拉可斯利享年91歲。

nameMeanings.name: Brereton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places called Brereton, in Cheshire and Staffordshire, and sometimes from Brearton in Yorkshire or Brierton in Durham. Brereton in Staffordshire is named with Old English brǣr, brēr ‘briar’ + Old English dūn ‘hill’ as its final element; the others are named with Old English brǣr, brēr ‘briar’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Brewerton
meanings: English: variant of   Brereton  , the result of confusion by folk etymology with the occupational name   Brewer  .

variants.name: Brierton
meanings: English: habitational name from Brierton in County Durham (formerly in Yorkshire) or Brearton in North Yorkshire, which are both named with Old English brēr ‘briar’ + tūn ‘farmstead’, or Brereton in Cheshire, which has the same origin (see Brereton ).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Brereton was born about 1415, in Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England, his father, William Brereton, was 27 and his mother, Alice Corbet, was 27. He married Lydia Ward on 28 April 1452, in Leckhampstead, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 2 May 1505, in Blakesley, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 91.

Il a épousé Lydia Ward le 28 avril 1452, à Leckhampstead, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 2 mai 1505, à Blakesley, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 91 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Brereton(이)가 대략 1415년 영국 체실르 브레레턴 c 스멧h윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Brereton(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Corbet(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1452년 4월 28일 영국 벅잉함실르 렉함프스테아드에서 Lydia Ward(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1505년 5월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 블레이케슬리에서 91세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Lydia Ward em 28 de abril de 1452, em Leckhampstead, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Brereton родился около 1415 г. в местности бриретон кум сметвикк, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Brereton было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Corbet, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Lydia Ward 28 апреля 1452 г. в местности леккхампстид, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 2 мая 1505 г. в местности блеикесли, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 91 год.
